posts.text:
This is wrong that our conference chose to do this. Kevin Kiley broke no laws. There are members of Congress who are actively being investigated and have broken laws/are very corrupt and they are sitting on committees. Not a good look @HouseGOP.


Jake Sherman (@JakeSherman)

BREAKING — KEVIN KILEY has lost all committee assignments after leaving the Republican Conference.



— https://nitter.net/JakeSherman/status/2034349301686505909#m

I am starting to see an orchestrated media campaign to increase tension with Russia via planted sources. The U.S. and this admin is still very involved in peace talks with Russia regarding Ukraine and that is not going to be sabotaged by ANYONE. I am informing the American people on this as there is a ton of information circulating right now and some of it is false regarding this topic.

90% of DC is performative politics. What is happening to TSA right now is wrong. 

ICE has already been fully funded… so Senate Dems are objecting to paying TSA etc. 

Thune could remove the filibuster. But he won’t. Both get “F’s” on their report card. 

Again, performative politics.

UPDATE: I have confirmed with Pentagon that the threat was a hoax. 🙏🏼


Douglas Macgregor (@DougAMacgregor)

BREAKING: MacDill Air Force Base in Tampa, home to U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) under shelter-in-place order over threat.



— https://nitter.net/DougAMacgregor/status/2034326488909029638#m

I talked to multiple Senators today. They know the floor debate is for show and SAVE America is going NOWHERE in the Senate. 

Ask yourselves why Voter ID, that over 80% of Americans support, is being blocked? Thune this is not a paid influencer campaign. 

AMERICA: If your Senators do not work for you, it is time to find someone else willing to do the job.

Wild to see how offended these members were that they weren’t being recorded for their sound bites, when half of them voted to suppress the release of a Congressional slush fund on the house floor 🤷🏻‍♀️


Lauren Boebert (@laurenboebert)

.@AGPamBondi and @DAGToddBlanche have WILLINGLY come before the Oversight committee for a closed briefing to answer ANY and ALL questions Members have for them. 

Democrats all just stormed out after refusing to ask questions because the cameras are off.

Nothin

What’s happening right now in the Senate is a SHOW VOTE. @LeaderJohnThune has absolutely no intention of passing the SAVE America Act, they are hoping it will just fade away and that people will stop calling them. 

DON’T STOP. HOLD THE LINE!

Video

Parents have a fundamental right to know what is happening in their child’s life, especially when it comes to sensitive and life-altering issues. Schools should never act as a substitute for parents or encourage children to keep secrets from their families.

This bill is about restoring trust, accountability, and common sense in our education system. Families, not government institutions, should guide children through important personal decisions.

The Senate is taking up the SAVE America Act this week but that does not mean they are serious about actually getting it signed into law. @LeaderJohnThune knows he does not have the 60 votes needed to pass it and also won’t invoke the standing filibuster, so he is doing this for messaging.

The Senate plans to leave debate open for as long as Senators continue to debate (probably a couple of days). They are doing this to try and get around having to invoke the standing filibuster but I won’t let
Election integrity is the foundation of our republic. If we don’t protect the vote, we lose the country. It’s that simple and it’s that serious.

First and foremost, Elizabeth Warren sabotaged this Housing Bill by killing the permanent ban on CBDCs, which is a nonnegotiable nonstarter regardless of SAVE America. 

thehill.com/homenews/house/5…

This isn’t about politics, it’s about protecting every legal vote. The SAVE America Act puts American citizens first and removes illegal voters. It’s the only way to safeguard the future of our elections and save our Republic.

Is Save America attached?


Meredith Lee Hill (@meredithllee)

NEWS — Speaker Mike Johnson told @politico he’s confident he can flip the GOP hardliners opposed to a clean FISA extension - even as they’re threatening to tank it on the floor next week

“They’ll get there," Johnson said in a brief interview Tuesday

This is a big vote for Johnson, and Trump — who wants a clean, 18-month extension. They’ll need near unanimity from Rs to clear the procedural rule. 

Johnson, asked if Trump needs to g

Liberty is not free. This is the mark of the new Tea Party. On the celebration of the 250th, we unite. We tell the Senate who is in charge. The people want voter ID. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents unite.

Speaker Johnson is wasting his time on a clean extension of FISA if it doesn’t have the SAVE America Act attached. Myself and others will vote it down until it does.

punchbowl.news/article/house…

At the end of the day there’s only one reason why the Senate won’t secure our elections: CORRUPTION.

There’s simply no other excuse to subvert the will of 85% of Americans.
